questions.question: Ek professional baker ke liye personal hygiene ka sabse important aspect kya hai?

options.B: Regularly nails trim karna
options.D: Khana banane se pehle aur baad mein haath dhona

questions.explanation: Food safety ke liye, khana banane se pehle aur baad mein haath dhona sabse zaroori personal hygiene practice hai.

questions.question: Cross-contamination ko rokne ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Raw aur cooked food ko alag rakhna
options.B: Ek hi chopping board par sab kuch kaatna
options.C: Sabhi bartano ko ek saath dhona

questions.explanation: Cross-contamination tab hota hai jab harmful bacteria ek food se doosre food mein transfer hote hain. Isse rokne ke liye raw aur cooked food ko alag rakhna chahiye.

questions.question: Baking mein measuring cups aur spoons ka use kyu zaroori hai?

options.A: Ingredients ko jaldi se add karne ke liye
options.B: Recipe mein consistency aur accuracy maintain karne ke liye
options.C: Kam ingredients use karne ke liye
options.D: Kitchen ko clean rakhne ke liye

questions.explanation: Baking ek precise science hai, jismein ingredients ki exact quantities bahut important hoti hain. Measuring cups aur spoons consistency aur accuracy provide karte hain.

questions.question: Oven ko preheat karna kyu important hai?

options.A: Taki baking process tez ho sake
options.B: Taki food evenly bake ho aur desired texture mile
options.D: Ingredients ko mix karne mein help karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Preheating se oven desired temperature par pahunch jata hai, jisse food evenly bake hota hai aur sahi texture aata hai, especially breads aur cakes ke liye.

questions.question: Baking mein 'mise en place' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Sabhi ingredients ko ek saath mix karna
options.B: Baking ke baad kitchen ko saaf karna
options.C: Sabhi ingredients ko ready aur organized karna before starting

questions.explanation: Mise en place ek French culinary term hai jiska matlab hai 'everything in its place'. Ismein sabhi ingredients ko weigh/measure karke, cut karke, aur ready rakhna shamil hai baking shuru karne se pehle.

questions.question: Ek bakery mein food spoilage ka common reason kya hai?

options.B: Improper storage temperatures

questions.explanation: Food ko galat temperature par store karne se bacteria aur mould grow karte hain, jisse food jaldi spoil ho jata hai.

questions.question: Baking ke liye dry ingredients ko measure karne ka sabse accurate tareeka kya hai?

options.B: Weighing scale use karna

questions.explanation: Weighing scale dry ingredients ko measure karne ka sabse accurate tareeka hai, especially flour jiske density mein variation ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Bakery mein fire safety ke liye sabse important precaution kya hai?

options.B: Emergency exits ko block na karna
options.C: Electrical equipment ko regularly check karna

questions.explanation: Fire safety ke liye yeh sabhi precautions zaroori hain. Fire extinguisher, clear exits aur electrical safety sab important hain.

questions.question: Food allergies wale customers ke liye bread banate waqt kis baat ka dhyaan rakhna chahiye?

options.A: Unke allergies ke baare mein poochhna
options.B: Alag utensils aur equipment use karna

questions.explanation: Allergy sufferers ke liye cross-contamination se bachna bahut important hai. Iske liye customer se information lena, separate tools use karna aur safe ingredients lena sab zaroori hai.

questions.question: Ek commercial bakery mein temperature control kyu critical hai?

options.B: Ingredients ki shelf life maintain karne aur microbial growth rokne ke liye
options.C: Oven ki efficiency badhane ke liye
options.D: Electricity bill kam karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Temperature control food safety aur quality ke liye essential hai. Sahi temperature se ingredients fresh rehte hain aur harmful bacteria ki growth rukti hai.

questions.question: Food handlers ko cuts aur wounds ko cover karna kyu zaroori hai?

options.A: Taki customer ko achha na lage
options.B: Taki food mein blood ya bacteria na ja sake

questions.explanation: Cuts aur wounds mein bacteria ho sakte hain jo food mein transfer ho sakte hain. Unhe cover karne se food contamination ka risk kam hota hai.

questions.question: Baking mein 'scaling' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Dough ko chote pieces mein kaatna
options.B: Ingredients ko accurate weight se measure karna

questions.explanation: Scaling ka matlab hai ingredients ko weighing scale par accurately measure karna. Yeh baking mein consistency ke liye bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Bakery mein pest control kyu important hai?

options.B: Taki pests food ko contaminate na karein aur health risks na badhayein
options.C: Taki customers ko darr na lage
options.D: Taki ingredients ka nuksaan na ho

questions.explanation: Pests jaise rodents aur insects food ko contaminate kar sakte hain aur diseases फैला सकते हैं. Isliye bakery mein effective pest control zaroori hai.

questions.question: Baking mein 'batch production' ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Consistency maintain karna easy hota hai aur waste kam hota hai

questions.explanation: Batch production mein ek saath badi quantity mein items banaye jaate hain, jisse consistency maintain karna aur ingredient waste kam karna easy hota hai.

questions.question: Aapko ek ingredient par mould dikhe toh kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Mould ko hata kar baaki ingredient use kar lena chahiye
options.B: Poore ingredient ko discard kar dena chahiye
options.C: Usse wash karke use karna chahiye
options.D: Usse bake karke use karna chahiye

questions.explanation: Mould ke roots ingredient ke andar tak phail sakte hain aur harmful toxins produce kar sakte hain, jo dikhai nahi dete. Isliye contaminated ingredient ko poora discard kar dena chahiye.

questions.question: Ek bakery mein kitchen equipment ki regular cleaning aur maintenance kyu important hai?

options.B: Taki equipment ki life badhe aur food safety maintain ho
options.D: Taki workers ko kaam karne mein aasani ho

questions.explanation: Regular cleaning se food particles aur bacteria accumulate nahi hote, aur maintenance se equipment ki efficiency aur life badhti hai, jisse food safety bhi maintain rehti hai.

questions.question: HACCP (Hazard Analysis and Critical Control Points) system bakery mein kyu use kiya jata hai?

options.A: Customer feedback collect karne ke liye
options.B: Food safety hazards ko identify aur control karne ke liye
options.C: New recipes develop karne ke liye
options.D: Staff training ko manage karne ke liye

questions.explanation: HACCP ek systematic approach hai jo food safety hazards (biological, chemical, physical) ko identify karta hai aur unhe control karne ke liye critical points set karta hai production process mein.

questions.question: Bread banate waqt sabse common type ka flour kaun sa use hota hai?

options.B: Pastry flour

questions.explanation: Bread flour mein high protein content hota hai, jo strong gluten develop karta hai, breads ke liye zaroori structure deta hai.

questions.question: Yeast ka primary function baking mein kya hai?

options.B: Dough ko color dena

questions.explanation: Yeast sugar ko ferment karke carbon dioxide gas produce karta hai, jo dough mein trapped hokar use rise karta hai.

questions.question: Salt bread dough mein kya role play karta hai?

options.B: Gluten ko strengthen karta hai aur flavour enhance karta hai

questions.explanation: Salt yeast activity ko control karta hai, gluten structure ko strengthen karta hai aur bread ke flavour ko enhance karta hai.

questions.question: Water ka kya role hai bread making mein?

options.B: Ingredients ko bind karna aur gluten formation mein help karna

questions.explanation: Water ingredients ko bind karta hai, flour mein protein ko hydrate karta hai jisse gluten develop hota hai, aur yeast activity ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: Sugar bread dough mein kya function perform karta hai?

options.B: Yeast ke liye food provide karta hai, crust ko color deta hai aur flavour add karta hai

questions.explanation: Sugar yeast ke liye food ka kaam karta hai, fermentation mein help karta hai, bread ke crust ko browning deta hai aur flavour add karta hai.

questions.question: Fat (jaise butter ya oil) bread mein kyu add kiya jata hai?

options.A: Taki bread jaldi stale ho jaye
options.B: Taki bread ka volume kam ho
options.C: Taki bread soft aur tender bane, aur shelf life badhe

questions.explanation: Fat bread ko tender karta hai, uski softness badhata hai aur shelf life ko extend karta hai, crust ko bhi softer banata hai.

questions.question: Eggs baking mein kya role play karte hain?

options.B: Binding, leavening, moisture aur richness provide karte hain

questions.explanation: Eggs ek versatile ingredient hain jo binding agent, leavening agent, moisture source aur richness provider ka kaam karte hain baked goods mein.

questions.question: High-gluten flour ka use kis type ke bread ke liye best hai?

options.B: Crispy cookies

questions.explanation: High-gluten flour strong aur elastic dough banata hai, jo chewy texture wale artisan breads ke liye ideal hai.

questions.question: Active dry yeast ko use karne se pehle kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Warm water aur thodi sugar mein dissolve karke 'proof' karna

questions.explanation: Active dry yeast ko warm water aur sugar mein proof karne se uski viability check ho jaati hai aur woh activate ho jaata hai.

questions.question: Baking soda (sodium bicarbonate) ko activate hone ke liye kis ingredient ki zaroorat hoti hai?

options.B: Fat

questions.explanation: Baking soda ek alkali hai aur gas produce karne ke liye use acid ki zaroorat hoti hai. Baking powder mein acid pehle se hota hai, lekin baking soda ko alag se acid chahiye.

questions.question: Baking powder mein kaun se do main components hote hain?

options.B: Baking soda aur acid

questions.explanation: Baking powder mein baking soda (alkali) aur ek ya do acidic salts hote hain, jo moisture aur heat ke saath react karke carbon dioxide release karte hain.

questions.question: Agar recipe mein 'strong flour' likha ho toh uska kya matlab hai?

options.B: Usmein high protein content hai

questions.explanation: Strong flour ka matlab hai usmein high protein (gluten) content hai, jo bread jaise products ke liye accha structure deta hai.

questions.question: Butter ko 'creaming' method mein use karne se pehle kis temperature par hona chahiye?

options.B: Melted

questions.explanation: Creaming method mein butter aur sugar ko fluffy hone tak beat kiya jata hai. Iske liye butter ka room temperature par softened hona zaroori hai.

questions.question: Whole wheat flour white flour se kaise alag hai?

options.B: Usmein bran aur germ bhi shamil hote hain

questions.explanation: Whole wheat flour mein wheat kernel ke sabhi parts (bran, germ, endosperm) shamil hote hain, jabki white flour mein sirf endosperm hota hai.

questions.question: Proofing ke liye yeast dough ko kis temperature par rakhna ideal hai?

options.B: Room temperature (approx. 25-30°C)

questions.explanation: Yeast activity ke liye warm aur moist environment ideal hota hai. Room temperature (25-30°C) fermentation ke liye sabse accha hai.

questions.question: Baking mein 'emulsifier' ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Water aur oil jaise ingredients ko mix hone mein help karna

questions.explanation: Emulsifiers do immiscible liquids (jaise oil aur water) ko stable emulsion banane mein help karte hain, jisse mixture smooth aur evenly distributed rehta hai.

questions.question: Dough ko knead karna kyu zaroori hai?

options.A: Taki dough ko patla kiya ja sake
options.B: Gluten strands develop karne aur dough ko elastic banane ke liye
options.C: Taki dough zyada sticky ho jaye

questions.explanation: Kneading se flour mein maujood proteins (glutenin aur gliadin) hydrate hokar gluten network banate hain, jo dough ko structure aur elasticity deta hai.

questions.question: Bread dough ko 'first proof' ke baad punch down kyu karte hain?

options.B: Fermentation gases ko release karne aur gluten ko relax karne ke liye
options.C: Taki dough ka colour change ho
options.D: Taki dough ka weight kam ho

questions.explanation: Punching down se excess carbon dioxide release hoti hai, jisse yeast ko fresh food milta hai, aur gluten relax hota hai, shaping ke liye dough ko easy banata hai.

questions.question: Dough mixing ke 'straight dough method' mein kya hota hai?

options.A: Ingredients ko alag-alag mix karte hain
options.B: Sabhi ingredients ko ek saath combine karke mix karte hain
options.D: Sirf bread flour use karte hain

questions.explanation: Straight dough method mein sabhi ingredients (flour, water, yeast, salt, etc.) ko ek saath combine karke mix aur knead kiya jata hai.

questions.question: 'Windowpane test' kya indicate karta hai?

options.B: Gluten development ka level

questions.explanation: Windowpane test mein dough ke ek chhote tukde ko carefully stretch kiya jata hai. Agar woh itna patla ho jaye ki light uske through dikhe bina fate, toh matlab gluten achhe se develop ho gaya hai.

questions.question: Over-kneaded dough ki kya pehchan hai?

options.B: Tear hone lagta hai aur elastic nahi hota

questions.explanation: Over-kneaded dough mein gluten strands itne tight ho jaate hain ki woh tear hone lagte hain aur apni elasticity kho dete hain.

questions.question: Proofing ke dauran dough ko cover karna kyu zaroori hai?

options.B: Taki uski surface dry na ho aur crust na bane

questions.explanation: Dough ko cover karne se uski surface dry hone se bachti hai, jisse ek hard crust nahi banta aur dough properly rise ho pata hai.

questions.question: 'Bulk fermentation' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Dough ko chote pieces mein divide karna
options.B: Pehle rise ke liye poore dough ko ferment karna
options.C: Dough ko oven mein bake karna

questions.explanation: Bulk fermentation, ya first rise, woh stage hai jab poore dough ko ek saath ferment hone diya jata hai mixing ke baad.

questions.question: Agar dough over-proof ho jaye toh kya hoga?

options.B: Woh collapse ho jayega aur usmein sour taste aa sakta hai

questions.explanation: Over-proofing se gluten structure weak ho jaata hai aur gases escape ho jaati hain, jisse dough collapse ho sakta hai. Yeast ne saari sugar consume kar li hoti hai, jisse sour taste bhi aa sakta hai.

questions.question: Dough ki consistency ko adjust karne ke liye kya add kar sakte hain, agar woh bahut dry ho?

options.B: Thoda aur pani

questions.explanation: Agar dough dry hai toh usmein thoda-thoda karke pani add kiya ja sakta hai jab tak desired consistency na mil jaye.

questions.question: Dough mixing mein 'autolyse' method ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Kneading time ko kam karta hai aur dough ko zyada extensible banata hai
options.B: Dough ko jaldi ferment karta hai

questions.explanation: Autolyse method mein flour aur water ko pehle mix karke rest karne dete hain, jisse flour fully hydrate ho jata hai aur gluten development shuru ho jata hai. Isse kneading time kam hota hai aur dough zyada extensible banta hai.

questions.question: Sourdough starter (levain) ka kya function hai?

options.B: Natural leavening agent ke roop mein kaam karna

questions.explanation: Sourdough starter wild yeast aur lactic acid bacteria ka culture hota hai, jo dough ko rise karne aur ek distinctive flavour dene ka kaam karta hai.

questions.question: Dough ko divide karne ke baad 'preshape' karna kyu important hai?

options.A: Taki dough ko jaldi bake kar sakein
options.B: Taki gluten relax ho aur final shaping easy ho
options.C: Taki dough ka weight barabar ho

questions.explanation: Preshaping se dough ke gluten relax hote hain, jisse final shaping mein elasticity aur workability improve hoti hai.

questions.question: Agar aapka dough sticky hai aur handle karna mushkil ho raha hai, toh kya solution hai?

options.B: Thoda aur flour add karein ya haathon ko oil se grease karein
options.C: Usse zyada der tak knead karein

questions.explanation: Sticky dough ko handle karne ke liye thoda aur flour add kiya ja sakta hai, ya haathon aur surface ko lightly oil ya flour se dust kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Dough ki proper 'proofing' ke liye humidity ka kya role hai?

options.A: Humidity ka koi role nahi hai
options.B: High humidity dough ko dry hone se rokti hai
options.C: Low humidity dough ko zyada rise karti hai
options.D: Humidity dough ko hard karti hai

questions.explanation: Proofing ke dauran high humidity dough ki surface ko dry hone se rokti hai, jisse crust nahi banta aur dough uniformly rise hota hai.

questions.question: Dough ke 'retardation' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Dough ko cold temperature par ferment karna
options.C: Dough ko zyada der tak knead karna

questions.explanation: Retardation mein dough ko cold temperature (refrigerator) par ferment kiya jata hai, jisse fermentation process slow ho jaati hai. Isse flavour development badhta hai aur baker ko scheduling mein flexibility milti hai.

questions.question: Agar dough under-kneaded ho, toh bread ka texture kaisa hoga?

options.B: Dense aur crumbly

questions.explanation: Under-kneaded dough mein gluten achhe se develop nahi hota, jisse bread dense, crumbly aur kam volume wala banta hai.

questions.question: Dough ke 'final proof' ke baad usse kaise check karte hain ki woh ready hai?

options.B: Finger dent test (dents slowly spring back)
options.D: Usse touch karke ki woh garam hai ya nahi

questions.explanation: Finger dent test mein, ek lightly floured ungli se dough ko gently poke karte hain. Agar dent slowly spring back ho, toh dough ready hai. Agar jaldi spring back ho toh under-proofed, aur agar bilkul spring back na ho toh over-proofed.

questions.question: Bread ko oven mein daalne se pehle usse 'scoring' (cuts lagana) kyu karte hain?

options.B: Steam escape ho sake aur bread evenly rise ho, artistic pattern bhi bane

questions.explanation: Scoring se bread ko ek controlled jagah milti hai jahan se woh oven spring ke dauran expand ho sake. Isse uneven tearing rukti hai aur ek sundar pattern banta hai.

questions.question: Baking ke dauran 'oven spring' kya hota hai?

options.B: Bread ka initial rapid rise oven mein

questions.explanation: Oven spring woh rapid expansion hai jo bread mein oven mein jaane ke baad hota hai, jab yeast activity aur trapped gases heat ke karan expand hote hain.

questions.question: Bread ko bake karne ke baad rack par cool karna kyu important hai?

options.A: Taki woh jaldi thanda ho jaye
options.B: Taki bottom soggy na ho aur condensation se bacha ja sake
options.C: Taki uski crust hard ho jaye

questions.explanation: Rack par cool karne se hawa bread ke chaaron taraf circulate hoti hai, jisse condensation rukti hai aur bread ka bottom soggy hone se bachta hai.

questions.question: French baguette mein kis type ka crust expect kiya jata hai?

options.B: Thick aur spongy

questions.explanation: French baguette ki pehchan uski thin, crispy crust aur light, airy interior (crumb) se hoti hai.

questions.question: Agar bread ka crust bahut mota aur hard ho jaye toh kya reason ho sakta hai?

options.B: Oven mein moisture ki kami

questions.explanation: Oven mein moisture (steam) ki kami se crust jaldi dry ho jaata hai aur mota aur hard banta hai. Steam crust ko supple rakhta hai aur oven spring mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Whole wheat bread banate waqt kis baat ka dhyaan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Whole wheat flour mein kam gluten hota hai, isliye zyada kneading ki zaroorat hoti hai ya white flour ke saath mix karna pad sakta hai

questions.explanation: Whole wheat flour mein bran particles gluten development ko interfere karte hain, isliye ya toh zyada kneading ya white flour ke saath blending se achha structure milta hai.

questions.question: Bread ko 'egg wash' kyu karte hain bake karne se pehle?

options.B: Crust ko shiny golden-brown colour aur thoda softness dene ke liye

questions.explanation: Egg wash bread ke crust ko ek rich, shiny golden-brown finish deta hai aur uski softness badhata hai.

questions.question: Ciabatta bread ki kya khas baat hai?

options.B: Crispy crust aur open, airy crumb hota hai

questions.explanation: Ciabatta ek Italian bread hai jiska naam 'slipper' se aata hai. Iski khas baat iska crispy crust aur irregular, open crumb structure hai.

questions.question: Bread ke 'crumb' se kya matlab hai?

options.B: Bread ka interior texture aur structure

questions.explanation: Crumb bread ke interior part ko refer karta hai, jismein uska texture, cell structure (holes) aur softness shamil hai.

questions.question: Agar bread bake hone ke baad 'gummy' ya 'doughy' reh jaye toh kya reason ho sakta hai?

options.B: Under-baking ya under-proofing

questions.explanation: Gummy texture under-baking ka sign ho sakta hai, jismein bread poori tarah se cook nahi hua hai. Under-proofing bhi iska karan ho sakta hai kyunki dough mein sufficient air cells develop nahi hue.

questions.question: Bread shaping mein 'boule' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Ek gol, round shape

questions.explanation: Boule French word hai jiska matlab 'ball' hai. Yeh ek classic round bread shape hai.

questions.question: Baking stone ya steel ka use oven mein kyu karte hain?

options.B: Taki bread ko bottom se zyada heat mile aur crispy crust bane

questions.explanation: Baking stone ya steel thermal mass provide karte hain, jo bread ko oven mein daalte hi instant high heat dete hain, jisse achha oven spring aur crispy bottom crust milta hai.

questions.question: Focaccia bread ki kya distinctive feature hai?

options.B: Flat, dimpled surface aur olive oil ka rich taste

questions.explanation: Focaccia ek Italian flatbread hai jo olive oil, herbs aur salt se flavour kiya jata hai. Iski surface par dimples hote hain.

questions.question: Bread ka ideal internal temperature kya hona chahiye jab woh fully baked ho?
questions.explanation: Zyadatar lean breads ke liye, 93-100°C (200-210°F) ka internal temperature indicate karta hai ki bread fully baked hai aur starch gelatinize ho gaya hai.

questions.question: Steam baking ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Crust ko thin aur crispy banata hai, aur oven spring ko enhance karta hai
options.C: Baking time ko kam karta hai
options.D: Bread ko zyada dense banata hai

questions.explanation: Steam crust ko supple rakhta hai, jisse dough ko expand hone ka zyada time milta hai (oven spring). Yeh crust ko thin, glossy aur crispy bhi banata hai.

questions.question: Agar bread ka base jal jaye lekin andar se kachcha reh jaye toh kya problem ho sakti hai?

options.B: Oven temperature bahut zyada hai ya bread oven ke bottom ke bahut paas hai
options.D: Zyada water use kiya gaya hai

questions.explanation: Agar oven ka temperature bahut zyada hai ya bread heat source ke bahut paas hai, toh crust jaldi brown ho jayega jabki andar ka part kachcha reh jayega.

questions.question: Pita bread ki khas baat kya hai?

options.B: Flatbread jo bake hone par pocket banata hai

questions.explanation: Pita bread high temperature par bake hota hai, jisse uske andar steam trap ho jaati hai aur ek distinctive pocket ban jata hai.

questions.question: Shortcrust pastry mein 'short' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Kam ingredients use hote hain
options.C: Fat ke karan gluten strands chote ho jaate hain, jisse tender aur crumbly texture milta hai

questions.explanation: 'Short' refers to the short gluten strands jo fat ke flour mein incorporate hone se bante hain. Isse pastry tender aur crumbly banti hai.

questions.question: Puff pastry banate waqt 'lamination' process kyu zaroori hai?

options.B: Taki fat ki layers ban sakein, jo bake hone par fluffy aur flaky texture dete hain

questions.explanation: Lamination mein dough ko baar-baar roll aur fold kiya jata hai fat (butter) ke saath, jisse dough aur fat ki alternating layers banti hain. Baking par, fat melt hota hai aur steam release karta hai, jisse layers separate hokar flaky texture dete hain.

questions.question: Cake batter mein 'creaming method' ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Fat aur sugar ko light aur fluffy hone tak beat karna, jisse air incorporate ho aur cake light bane

questions.explanation: Creaming method mein butter aur sugar ko ek saath beat kiya jata hai, jisse air trapped ho jaati hai. Yeh air leavening mein help karti hai aur cake ko light aur fluffy banati hai.

questions.question: Agar cake bake hone ke baad center se sink ho jaye toh kya reason ho sakta hai?

options.B: Under-baking, oven ka darwaza jaldi kholna ya recipe mein imbalance

questions.explanation: Cake ka center sink hona under-baking, oven ka darwaza jaldi kholne se temperature drop hona, ya recipe mein liquid/leavening agent ka imbalance hone se ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Cookies ko bake karne ke baad cool karna kyu zaroori hai?

options.A: Taki woh jaldi kharab na ho
options.B: Taki woh set ho jayein aur crispy banein

questions.explanation: Cookies bake hone ke baad bhi hot baking sheet par cook hote rehte hain. Unhe cool karne se woh set ho jaate hain aur desired texture (crispy ya chewy) attain karte hain.

questions.question: Choux pastry ka main characteristic kya hai?

options.B: Hollow center jo fillings ke liye ideal hai

questions.explanation: Choux pastry (jaise eclairs aur profiteroles) high heat par bake hone par steam se inflate hoti hai, jisse andar ek hollow cavity banti hai, jo custard ya cream se fill karne ke liye perfect hai.

questions.question: Muffins banate waqt batter ko overmix kyu nahi karna chahiye?

options.A: Taki woh zyada meethe na ho
options.B: Overmixing se gluten develop ho jata hai, jisse muffins tough aur chewy bante hain

questions.explanation: Muffins ke batter ko lightly mix karna chahiye jab tak dry aur wet ingredients combine na ho jayein. Overmixing se gluten develop hota hai, jisse muffins tough aur leathery ho jaate hain.

questions.question: Laminated dough ka ek example kaun sa hai?

options.B: Sourdough bread

questions.explanation: Croissant dough ek classic example hai laminated dough ka, jismein butter ki layers ko dough mein fold kiya jata hai, jisse flaky texture aata hai.

questions.question: Pie crust ko 'blind bake' kyu karte hain?

options.B: Taki woh soggy na ho jab usmein wet filling daali jaye

questions.explanation: Blind baking mein pie crust ko filling daalne se pehle partially ya fully bake kiya jata hai, jisse woh wet fillings ke contact mein aane par soggy hone se bachta hai.

questions.question: Macarons ki khas pehchan kya hai?

options.B: Crispy outer shell aur chewy interior (feet ke saath)

questions.explanation: Macarons almond flour se bante hain aur unki distinctive feature unka smooth, crispy outer shell aur chewy interior hota hai, jiske base par 'feet' (ruffled edge) hote hain.

questions.question: Sponge cake mein light aur airy texture kaise achieve karte hain?

options.B: Eggs ko sugar ke saath fluffy hone tak beat karke air incorporate karna

questions.explanation: Sponge cake mein eggs aur sugar ko achhe se beat karke air incorporate ki jati hai, jo primary leavening agent ka kaam karti hai aur cake ko light aur airy banati hai.

questions.question: Danish pastry mein kaun sa dough use hota hai?

options.B: Puff pastry

questions.explanation: Danish pastry ek rich, flaky pastry hai jo yeast-leavened laminated dough se banti hai, jismein butter ki layers hoti hain.

questions.question: Cookies ko store karne ka sabse achha tareeka kya hai?

options.B: Airtight container mein room temperature par

questions.explanation: Airtight container mein store karne se cookies ki freshness aur texture maintain rehta hai aur woh stale nahi hote.

questions.question: Agar aapka cake bahut dry bane toh kya reason ho sakta hai?

options.B: Over-baking ya bahut kam liquid/fat

questions.explanation: Over-baking se cake mein se moisture evaporate ho jaati hai. Recipe mein kam liquid ya fat bhi dry cake ka karan ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Éclairs ke liye kis pastry ka use hota hai?

options.B: Shortcrust pastry

questions.explanation: Éclairs choux pastry se bante hain, jo bake hone par hollow ho jaati hai aur usmein cream ya custard bhara jata hai.

questions.question: Cupcakes ko decorate karne ke liye sabse common topping kya hai?

options.B: Whipped cream

questions.explanation: Buttercream frosting cupcakes ko decorate karne ke liye sabse popular aur versatile topping hai, jo piping bags aur nozzles se different designs banane mein help karti hai.

questions.question: Agar aapki shortcrust pastry bake hone par shrink ho jaye toh kya problem ho sakti hai?

options.B: Dough ko rest nahi diya gaya ya over-worked kiya gaya

questions.explanation: Agar pastry dough ko rest nahi diya jata toh gluten relax nahi hota. Roll karne par gluten stretch ho jaata hai aur bake hone par contract (shrink) ho jata hai.

questions.question: Ek bakery mein 'inventory management' kyu important hai?

options.A: Taki sabhi ingredients jaldi expire ho jayein
options.B: Taki ingredients ka waste kam ho, cost control ho aur supply chain smooth rahe
options.C: Taki zyada se zyada ingredients khareedein
options.D: Taki customers ko pata chale ki kya stock mein hai

questions.explanation: Proper inventory management se ingredients ka waste kam hota hai, storage costs control hote hain aur production ke liye hamesha required stock available rehta hai.

questions.question: Customer feedback collect karne ka kya fayda hai bakery ke liye?

options.B: Products aur services ko improve karne ke liye valuable insights provide karna

questions.explanation: Customer feedback se bakery ko pata chalta hai ki unke products aur services mein kya accha hai aur kahan improvement ki zaroorat hai, jisse customer satisfaction badhta hai.

questions.question: Bread ko stale hone se bachane ka sabse accha tareeka kya hai?

options.B: Airtight container ya plastic wrap mein room temperature par store karna

questions.explanation: Bread ko airtight container ya plastic wrap mein room temperature par store karne se uski freshness maintain rehti hai. Refrigerator mein starch retrogradation tez ho jaata hai, jisse bread jaldi stale hota hai.

questions.question: Bakery mein 'food costing' kyu zaroori hai?

options.A: Taki products ko overpriced kiya ja sake
options.B: Products ki profitability determine karne aur selling price set karne ke liye
options.D: Sirf government regulations follow karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Food costing se har product banane mein kitna kharcha aata hai, yeh calculate kiya jata hai. Isse bakery sahi selling price set kar sakti hai aur profit margin maintain kar sakti hai.

questions.question: Agar bread dough rise nahi ho raha hai toh kya possible reasons ho sakte hain?

options.B: Yeast inactive hai, liquid bahut garam ya thanda hai, ya salt zyada hai

questions.explanation: Yeast ke inactive hone (expired ya galat temperature par store), liquid ka temperature (bahut garam ya thanda yeast ko maar sakta hai), ya zyada salt yeast activity ko inhibit kar sakta hai.

questions.question: Bakery mein 'first-in, first-out (FIFO)' system kyu use karte hain?

options.A: Taki new stock pehle use ho
options.B: Taki purana stock pehle use ho aur waste kam ho
options.D: Taki products zyada der tak store ho sakein

questions.explanation: FIFO system yeh ensure karta hai ki jo ingredients pehle aaye hain, woh pehle use hon, jisse expiration aur spoilage ka risk kam hota hai.

questions.question: Customer service mein complaint handling ka kya tareeka hona chahiye?

options.B: Complaint ko sunna, empathize karna aur solution provide karna

questions.explanation: Ek achha baker customer complaints ko professionally handle karta hai. Sunna, samajhna aur ek satisfactory solution dena customer loyalty ke liye important hai.

questions.question: Bakery mein 'production schedule' kyu banate hain?

options.A: Taki staff ko busy rakha ja sake
options.B: Taki production efficient ho, waste kam ho aur deadlines meet ho
options.C: Taki products ki variety kam ho

questions.explanation: Production schedule se yeh plan kiya jata hai ki kaun sa product kab banega, kitni quantity mein, aur kis time tak ready hoga. Isse efficiency badhti hai aur waste kam hota hai.

questions.question: Agar aapka cake 'domed' ho jaye (center se zyada rise ho) toh kya reason ho sakta hai?

options.B: Oven temperature bahut zyada hai, jisse crust jaldi set ho gaya aur andar ka batter upar push hua

questions.explanation: High oven temperature se cake ka outer crust jaldi set ho jata hai, jabki andar ka batter abhi bhi expand ho raha hota hai, jisse woh upar ki taraf push hota hai aur domed shape banata hai.

questions.question: Bakery mein 'portion control' kyu important hai?

options.A: Taki customers ko kam product mile
options.B: Taki consistency maintain ho, cost control ho aur customer satisfaction badhe
options.D: Taki staff ko kam kaam karna pade

questions.explanation: Portion control se har product ki size aur weight consistent rehta hai, jisse costing accurate hoti hai aur customer ko har baar ek jaisa product milta hai.

questions.question: Ek bakery mein 'upselling' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Customer ko zyada mehenga product recommend karna
options.B: Customer ko ek related product suggest karna (jaise bread ke saath jam)

questions.explanation: Upselling mein customer ko ek superior ya zyada mehenga version ka product offer kiya jata hai jo unki original choice se behtar ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Agar bread ka crumb 'dense' aur 'heavy' ho toh kya problem ho sakti hai?

options.B: Under-kneading ya under-proofing

questions.explanation: Dense aur heavy crumb under-kneading (gluten develop nahi hua) ya under-proofing (sufficient gas produce nahi hui) ka sign ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Bakery mein 'waste management' kyu important hai?

options.B: Environmental impact kam karne aur operational costs reduce karne ke liye
options.C: Taki staff ko waste handle karna pade

questions.explanation: Effective waste management se bakery apne environmental footprint ko kam kar sakti hai aur ingredients ke waste ko minimize karke costs bacha sakti hai.

questions.question: Bakery mein 'seasonal menu' introduce karne ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Fresh ingredients use karna, customer interest maintain karna aur sales boost karna
options.D: Sirf ek hi type ka product bechna

questions.explanation: Seasonal menu fresh aur locally available ingredients ko highlight karta hai, customers mein excitement banaye rakhta hai aur naye products se sales ko boost karta hai.

questions.question: Agar ek cake 'crumbly' aur 'dry' ho toh kya troubleshooting step lenge?

options.B: Agli baar liquid aur fat ki quantity badhayein ya baking time kam karein

questions.explanation: Crumbly aur dry cake moisture ki kami ka sign hai. Isse theek karne ke liye agle batch mein liquid aur fat badhaya ja sakta hai, ya baking time ko kam kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Bakery ke liye 'branding' kyu important hai?

options.B: Taki customer loyalty build ho, business ko pehchan mile aur market mein alag dikhe

questions.explanation: Strong branding ek bakery ko uske competitors se alag karta hai, uski identity banata hai aur customers ke mind mein trust aur loyalty build karta hai.
